name: pi-contextimate
description: Observability extensions for the Pi coding agent
readme: # pine-of-glass Small observability and context management tools for the [Pi coding agent](https://github.com/earendil-works/pi-coding-agent). 1. [`contextimate`](./extensions/pi-contextimate) breaks down what is filling your context window: sysprompt, AGENTS.md, Skill frontmatter, Tool schemas, and session material. Toggle with ctrl+o on start and /reload. 2. [`traceline`](./extensions/pi-traceline) collapses tool calls to one trace line each, so you can see the full arc of what Pi did (path taken, context read, bloated tool results). Toggle with ctrl+t. 3. `cachemire` coming soon. See each extension's own `README.md` for details, and `docs/` for deeper reference. ## Installation - From GitHub: `pi install git:github.com/tmustier/pine-of-glass` - From npm (installs both `contextimate` and `traceline`): `pi install npm:pi-contextimate` ## Screenshots ### [Contextimate](./extensions/pi-contextimate) ### [Traceline](./extensions/pi-traceline)
